title: Dense Delicate Middle Eastern Shungiku Umm Ali
description: A traditional Middle Eastern dessert, made with layers of flaky pastry, sweetened milk, and fragrant herbs.
instructions: Thaw the phyllo dough according to the package instructions.
Layer the phyllo dough in a 9x13 inch baking dish, brushing each layer with melted butter.
In a large bowl, mix together the warm milk, granulated sugar, ground cinnamon, ground cardamom, and salt.
Add the shungiku leaves to the milk mixture and stir to combine.
Pour the milk mixture over the layered phyllo dough.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and bake for 25 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10-15 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool for 10 minutes.
Serve warm, garnished with additional shungiku leaves if desired.
